en.name: Level 14 — Paradise
en.shortDescription: A dreamlike forest realm that lures wanderers into a collective consciousness, absorbing their minds and making escape all but impossible.
en.atmosphere: Serene yet wrong: starlit skies, waterfalls and crimson grass masking a parasitic hive-mind that hungers to assimilate.
en.tips: Do not read the wall inscriptions. Resist the peaceful pull urging you to surrender to the collective.
